title: lastrea hirsuta
intro: Lastrea hirsuta, also known as the hairy fern, is a type of fern plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve respiratory issues. The leaves of the Lastrea hirsuta plant have been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide health benefits such as lowering blood pressure and improving digestion. In traditional medicine, the plant is also used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
